title: Automations for entire team
excerpt:
I presmure that all of automations, integrations etc will effect everyone who is a member for the workspace? 
If I for instance make a automation for my Outlook calender, so will this affect everyone in my workspace?

posts.author: Pierce007 (Rune Haarberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
I presmure that all of automations, integrations etc will effect everyone who is a member for the workspace?
If I for instance make a automation for my Outlook calender, so will this affect everyone in my workspace?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Pierce007 - yes, all automations are system wide and will effect all users. Outlook integrations are a bit of an exceptions depending on how you have them setup as each user needs to authorize their accounts in order for them to be integrated within monday.

Hope this helps,
Mark

Green Llamas
